items.title: The Beginning
items.description: The Stonesfield Players are founded in the village of Stonesfield, near Witney, Oxfordshire.

items.title: Growing Membership
items.description: Becki Sherlaw-Johnson joins as a teenager — she would go on to become the group's longest-serving member.

items.title: Original Works
items.description: The Players premiere a one-act play by Sally Wainwright and begin producing more original work written by members.

items.title: Competition Success
items.description: The group enters local drama competitions and wins both junior and senior categories. Young member Rupert Friend begins his acting journey.

items.title: Cold Comfort Farm
items.description: A brilliant production of Stella Gibbons' classic at Stonesfield Village Hall, directed by Becki Sherlaw-Johnson. Three nights, sold-out audiences.

items.title: Mercy of Sisters
items.description: Our next production — coming to the Village Hall in late June 2026. Watch this space!
